reviews.comment:
Mala atención, mala actitud de los playeros, ese lugar no deberia ser llamado estacion de servicios, porque de servicios carece desastrozamente, los baños por poco y tenes q mendigar q te lo habiliten, los mantienen llaveados, para cobrarte tardan una eternidad, malo, malo, mailisimo, ypf deberia retirarles la bandera.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, bad attitude from the attendants, that place shouldn't be called a service station, because it's disastrously lacking in services, the bathrooms are so bad you practically have to beg to use them, they keep them locked, and it takes forever to charge you, bad, bad, terrible, YPF should take away their brand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBa3JpekNnEAE
